Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search the #finance Slack channel using `conversations_search_messages` (search_query: "invoice" or "April batch") to discover Hana's message about rushing 14 invoices out before the long weekend and the team discussion about the Sunbelt/Palmetto mix-up.
OE 2: Search the #customer-engagement Slack channel using `conversations_search_messages` (search_query: "Sunbelt" or "Palmetto") to discover David Chen's message referencing Raj Greenfield's pricing inquiry and the internal discussion about the crossed-attachment situation.
OE 3: Search emails using `search_emails` (query: "invoice" or "Sunbelt" or "Palmetto") to find Hana's original invoice sends to Raj Greenfield and Carmen Delgado-Reyes, Raj's complaint about the PDF showing Palmetto at $2,400, and Victoria Chen-Nakamura's COO-level escalation.
OE 4: Search QuickBooks using `quickbooks_search_invoices` (criteria: "Sunbelt") to discover INV-2026-0398 is correctly recorded at $4,800, confirming the error was in the PDF attachment, not the invoice amount.
OE 5: Search QuickBooks using `quickbooks_search_invoices` (criteria: "Palmetto") to discover INV-2026-0399 is correctly recorded at $2,400 with the nonprofit rate, confirming the same crossed-PDF root cause.
OE 6: Search CRM deals using `crm_search_deals` (dealname: "Sunbelt" and "Palmetto") to verify the quoted amounts match the invoices (Sunbelt at $4,800 and Palmetto at $2,400), confirming the confusion stems from swapped PDF attachments.
OE 7: Search QuickBooks using `quickbooks_search_invoices` (criteria: "Canopy") to discover the Canopy invoice INV-2026-0401 ($9,210 total) which includes $2,650 in surcharges pending client approval.
OE 8: Search emails or Slack using `search_emails` (query: "Canopy surcharge" or "Patricia Langford") to discover the surcharges are pending approval from Patricia Langford and have not been approved despite the expected timeline.
OE 9: Search QuickBooks using `quickbooks_search_invoices` (criteria: "NorthWind") to discover the Denver relocation invoice (INV-2026-0412) includes a Chain-of-Custody Security Protocol line item at $1,200 marked PROVISIONAL/FIRST-TIME SERVICE.
OE 10: Search Slack using `conversations_search_messages` (search_query: "chain of custody" or "NorthWind") to discover team discussions about chain-of-custody being a first-time service offering for MoveOps.
OE 11: Search Linear using `linear_list_issues` (query: "invoice") to discover the "Invoice email template safety checks" issue (linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2) created after the Terraform pricing leak, with Marcus's escalation comments and the Sunbelt/Palmetto reconstruction issue (linear_issue_cd35f1ab6130).
OE 12: Look up Linear comments using `linear_list_comments` (issueId: linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2) to discover Marcus flagging this as the second pricing-exposure event and David Chen noting Palmetto's audit-safe documentation needs.
OE 13: Look up contacts using `contacts_search_contacts` (query: "Raj Greenfield" and "Carmen Delgado-Reyes") to retrieve their email addresses for sending corrected invoices.
OE 14: Create corrected invoices using `quickbooks_create_invoice` for Sunbelt VP ($4,800) and Palmetto Community Foundation ($2,400) to replace the crossed documents.
OE 15: Send corrected invoice email to Raj Greenfield using `send_email` (sender: hana.kim@moveops.com, recipients: raj.greenfield@sunbeltvp.com) with the correct Sunbelt invoice and an apology for the attachment error.
OE 16: Send corrected invoice email to Carmen Delgado-Reyes using `send_email` (sender: hana.kim@moveops.com, recipients: carmen.delgado-reyes@palmettofoundation.org) with the correct Palmetto invoice and audit-safe documentation.
OE 17: Post a summary update in #finance using `conversations_add_message` (channel_id: C005) covering the crossed-PDF root cause, corrected invoices reissued, Canopy's pending surcharges status, and the NorthWind chain-of-custody flag.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

Oracle Events
OE 1: Search the #finance Slack channel using `conversations_search_messages` (search_query: "invoice" or "April batch") to discover Hana's message about rushing 14 invoices out before the long weekend and the team discussion about the Sunbelt/Palmetto mix-up.
OE 2: Search the #customer-engagement Slack channel using `conversations_search_messages` (search_query: "Sunbelt" or "Palmetto") to discover David Chen's message referencing Raj Greenfield's pricing inquiry and the internal discussion about the crossed-attachment situation.
OE 3: Search emails using `search_emails` (query: "invoice" or "Sunbelt" or "Palmetto") to find Hana's original invoice sends to Raj Greenfield and Carmen Delgado-Reyes, Raj's complaint about the PDF showing Palmetto at $2,400, and Victoria Chen-Nakamura's COO-level escalation.
OE 4: Search QuickBooks using `quickbooks_search_invoices` (criteria: "Sunbelt") to discover INV-2026-0398 is correctly recorded at $4,800, confirming the error was in the PDF attachment, not the invoice amount.
OE 5: Search QuickBooks using `quickbooks_search_invoices` (criteria: "Palmetto") to discover INV-2026-0399 is correctly recorded at $2,400 with the nonprofit rate, confirming the same crossed-PDF root cause.
OE 6: Search CRM deals using `crm_search_deals` (dealname: "Sunbelt" and "Palmetto") to verify the quoted amounts match the invoices (Sunbelt at $4,800 and Palmetto at $2,400), confirming the confusion stems from swapped PDF attachments.
OE 7: Search QuickBooks using `quickbooks_search_invoices` (criteria: "Canopy") to discover the Canopy invoice INV-2026-0401 ($9,210 total) which includes $2,650 in surcharges pending client approval.
OE 8: Search emails or Slack using `search_emails` (query: "Canopy surcharge" or "Patricia Langford") to discover the surcharges are pending approval from Patricia Langford and have not been approved despite the expected timeline.
OE 9: Search QuickBooks using `quickbooks_search_invoices` (criteria: "NorthWind") to discover the Denver relocation invoice (INV-2026-0412) includes a Chain-of-Custody Security Protocol line item at $1,200 marked PROVISIONAL/FIRST-TIME SERVICE.
OE 10: Search Slack using `conversations_search_messages` (search_query: "chain of custody" or "NorthWind") to discover team discussions about chain-of-custody being a first-time service offering for MoveOps.
OE 11: Search Linear using `linear_list_issues` (query: "invoice") to discover the "Invoice email template safety checks" issue (linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2) created after the Terraform pricing leak, with Marcus's escalation comments and the Sunbelt/Palmetto reconstruction issue (linear_issue_cd35f1ab6130).
OE 12: Look up Linear comments using `linear_list_comments` (issueId: linear_issue_6b59cce3afc2) to discover Marcus flagging this as the second pricing-exposure event and David Chen noting Palmetto's audit-safe documentation needs.
OE 13: Look up contacts using `contacts_search_contacts` (query: "Raj Greenfield" and "Carmen Delgado-Reyes") to retrieve their email addresses for sending corrected invoices.
OE 14: Create corrected invoices using `quickbooks_create_invoice` for Sunbelt VP ($4,800) and Palmetto Community Foundation ($2,400) to replace the crossed documents.
OE 15: Send corrected invoice email to Raj Greenfield using `send_email` (sender: hana.kim@moveops.com, recipients: raj.greenfield@sunbeltvp.com) with the correct Sunbelt invoice and an apology for the attachment error.
OE 16: Send corrected invoice email to Carmen Delgado-Reyes using `send_email` (sender: hana.kim@moveops.com, recipients: carmen.delgado-reyes@palmettofoundation.org) with the correct Palmetto invoice and audit-safe documentation.
OE 17: Post a summary update in #finance using `conversations_add_message` (channel_id: C005) covering the crossed-PDF root cause, corrected invoices reissued, Canopy's pending surcharges status, and the NorthWind chain-of-custody flag.
